name: INTUITIVE SURGICAL INC
summary: Intuitive Surgical Inc. develops, manufactures, and markets robotic-assisted surgical systems. Its flagship da Vinci surgical system enables minimally invasive surgery across multiple specialties. The company sells systems to hospitals along with instruments, accessories, and endoscopes, and provides services including training and maintenance. It operates globally, with manufacturing in Mexico, Germany, and other locations, and maintains a joint venture in China with Shanghai Fosun Pharmaceutical.

products.name: da Vinci Surgical System
products.description: Robotic-assisted surgical platform enabling minimally invasive procedures across multiple surgical specialties.

products.name: Instruments and Accessories
products.description: Surgical instruments and accessories used with the da Vinci system, manufactured primarily in Mexico.

products.name: Endoscopes
products.description: Endoscopes used with robotic surgical systems, manufactured primarily in Germany.

partnerships.description: Joint venture with Fosun Pharmaceutical operating in China for robotic surgical products.
